title: bistorta major subsp. elliptica
intro: Bistorta major subsp. elliptica, also known as Polygonum bistorta subsp. ellipticum, is a subspecies of the Bistorta major plant, which belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It is a perennial plant with edible leaves and roots that have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bistorta major subsp. elliptica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. Bistorta major subsp. elliptica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
